code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    let b = if is_end
      32
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            total = total + v
          else if v < 0
            total = total - v
          end
        when None
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
